isi.lyrics_timestamp:
[Intro]
(Ha-ah, ah-ah, ah-ah)

[Verse 1: Eve]
Kaze no tsute ga hakonde kureru
Tsuki ni odoreba yoru ni somaru madou
Kawaku hodo ni mitasarenai
Kono shunkan ga hoshikute

[Pre-Chorus: suis]
Mada wakaranai mayoeru kohitsuji no you
Nanimo no demo nai tokubetsu de wa nai you de
Asu ga hoshikatta tadorubeki sekai no yoake e to (Ah)

[Chorus: Eve & suis]
Koe ga hibiku kimi to woah, kimi no
Itsuka wo tsunagu unmei no you na
Kasanariau kyoumei no ansemu
Wazuka na inori daku hibi yo

[Post-Chorus: Eve & suis, suis]
Dare yori egaita kibou omou yume mo
Inochi no iro ga kagayaku mahou
Sono chikara ga naku tatte mou
Mayou koto wa nai sa
Fushigi na hibi yo

[Verse 2: Eve & suis, Eve]
Akogare dake ga kimi no shisen wo hiki tsukeru
Abisu no ori toki ni kyou chou izanau honoo
Dareka wo shiawase ni shitai to negau kokoro
Yadoru senkou

[Pre-Chorus: Eve, suis]
Sore wa maru de ten to ten ga tsunagari
Utsukushii ko wo egaku you de
Itoshii to omoeta sore dake de sеkai wa michite iku

[Interlude]
(Ha-ah, ah-ah, ah, ah)
(Ah, ah, ooh-ah)

[Bridge: suis, Eve & suis, Eve]
Ayamachi mo tamerai mo koukai no ato mo
Sono subetе wo ima dakishimete
Kako kara mirai e tadorubeki sekai no yoake e to
Mahou no you ni tsumuideiku

[Pre-Chorus: Eve, suis, Eve & suis]
Koe ga hibiku kimi no
Mayou ashidori wa tashika na mono e to
Dare yori egaita kibou
Chiisana bouken ga ookina kiseki e to

[Chorus: Eve & suis]
Koe ga hibiku kimi to woah, kimi no
Itsuka wo tsunagu unmei no you na
Kasanari au kyoumei no ansemu
Wazuka na inori daku hibi yo

[Post-Chorus: Eve & suis, suis, Eve]
Dare yori egaita kibou omou yume mo
Inochi no iro ga kagayaku mahou
Sono chikara ga naku tatte mou
Mayou koto wa nai sa
Fushigi na hibi yo
